summary: Multi-language support testing completed successfully for all 7 languages (English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, Italian, Chinese). All navigation and footer translations work correctly on Homepage, Features, Pricing, and Contact pages. Language selector cycles through all 7 languages properly. No raw translation keys visible.
critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext.js contains complete translations for all 7 languages with proper footer/nav keys
All marketing pages (Landing.js, FeaturesPage.js, Pricing.js, Contact.js) correctly use t() function for translations
Language selector dropdown shows all 7 languages with flags and native names
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language support verified for all 7 languages.
